Notes: Kean wins the 2006-07 Cougar Classic.  MVP-Melissa Beyruti (Kean)
Kristy Camp (GMC), Ashley Vandiver (GMC), Kristy Cramp (GMC), Chari Cooper
Game.Officials: Jon Levinson,  Thomas Decker,  Nicholas Brown
